title: daphne micrantha
intro: Daphne micrantha, also known as the small leaved spurge, is a type of flowering plant in the Thymelaeaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, as well as acting as an antimicrobial agent. Daphne micrantha can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
